notes: Ported from the original Cashiro AlecuBankParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/AlecuBankParser.kt). ALECU (America's Largest Electric Credit Union) sends a single alert format: "ALEC Alert - A debit|credit transaction from MERCHANT for $X.XX on account *1=01 was posted on Mar 30, 2026." The Kotlin isTransactionMessage requires BOTH "alec alert" AND "transaction from"; the manifest filter only supports any-of, so we gate on the more discriminating "transaction from" (every dispatched ALECU alert also carries "ALEC Alert"). The Kotlin merchant extractor splits at the first ";" to drop trailing metadata ("WE EGIES ;12345 ;AUTOPAY"); here the same is achieved with a cleaning stripPattern.

fixtures.name: debit transaction - withdrawal
fixtures.body: ALEC Alert - A debit transaction from WITHDRAWAL for $100.00 on account *1=01 was posted on Mar 30, 2026. Reply STOP to stop all texts.

fixtures.name: debit transaction - autopay with semicolons
fixtures.body: ALEC Alert - A debit transaction from WE EGIES     ;12345 ;AUTOPAY for $177.33 on account *1=01 was posted on Mar 30, 2026. Reply STOP to stop all texts.

fixtures.name: credit transaction - deposit
fixtures.body: ALEC Alert - A credit transaction from PAYROLL DEPOSIT for $50.00 on account *1=01 was posted on Mar 30, 2026.

fixtures.name: otp message is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Your ALEC verification code is 123456. Do not share this code with anyone.

fixtures.name: balance alert without transaction is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: ALEC Alert - Your account *1=01 balance is $52.10 as of Mar 30, 2026.
